languages.text: {n}Старик морщится, но все так же почтительно кланяется вам. Юноша за его спиной округляет глаза и пытается выйти вперед, но старший офицер ловко хватает сына за длинный кабель, вделанный в голову. Из вокс-ретранслятора, заменяющего юноше рот, вырывается сдавленный кашель, перекрываемый громким голосом отца:{/n} "Мы примем любое ваше решение, Лорд-капитан".

{n}The old man frowns, but still bows respectfully to you. The young man behind him looks outraged and tries to step forward, but the older officer deftly seizes his son by the long cable embedded in his head. A stifled splutter erupts from the vox-repeater replacing the young man's mouth, but it is drowned out by the father's booming voice:{/n} "We will accept your decision whatever it may be, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}Старик морщится, но все так же почтительно кланяется вам. languages.text: {n}老人は眉をひそめたが、それでも敬意を払い頭を下げた。その背後では、若者は怒り狂い前に出て来るが、老兵は巧みにその息子を頭部に埋め込まれた長いケーブルで掴んだ。若者の口を覆うボイスリピーターから、息を殺して発せられた言葉は、老人の雄弁な声に飲み込まれた。{/n}「どんな決断であれ、我々は受け入れる、艦長様」
languages.original_text: {n}The old man frowns, but still bows respectfully to you. The young man behind him looks outraged and tries to step forward, but the older officer deftly seizes his son by the long cable embedded in his head. A stifled splutter erupts from the vox-repeater replacing the young man's mouth, but it is drowned out by the father's booming voice:{/n} "We will accept your decision whatever it may be, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}Yaşlı adam, kaşlarını çatsa da saygıyla önünde eğiliyor. Arkasındaki genç adam ise öfkeyle öne çıkmaya çalışıyor ancak yaşlı subay, oğlunu başındaki uzun kablodan ustaca yakalıyor. Genç adamın ağzının yerini alan voks yineleyiciden çıkan boğuk hırıltı, babasının gür sesiyle bastırılıyor.{/n} "Kararınız ne olursa olsun kabul ediyoruz Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: {n}The old man frowns, but still bows respectfully to you. The young man behind him looks outraged and tries to step forward, but the older officer deftly seizes his son by the long cable embedded in his head. A stifled splutter erupts from the vox-repeater replacing the young man's mouth, but it is drowned out by the father's booming voice:{/n} "We will accept your decision whatever it may be, Lord Captain."

Arkasındaki genç adam ise öfkeyle öne çıkmaya çalışıyor ancak yaşlı subay, oğlunu başındaki uzun kablodan ustaca yakalıyor. Genç adamın ağzının yerini alan voks yineleyiciden çıkan boğuk hırıltı, babasının gür sesiyle bastırılıyor.{/n} "Kararınız ne olursa olsun kabul ediyoruz Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: {n}年长者眉头紧锁，但仍恭敬地向你鞠躬。他身后的年轻人面露愤慨试图上前，但年长军官敏捷地拽住了儿子头部嵌入的长线缆。年轻人的音阵装置里爆发出一阵压抑的杂音，随即被父亲洪亮的声音所淹没：{/n}“无论您作何决定，我们都将遵从，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}The old man frowns, but still bows respectfully to you. The young man behind him looks outraged and tries to step forward, but the older officer deftly seizes his son by the long cable embedded in his head. languages.text: {n}Der alte Mann runzelt die Stirn, verneigt sich aber respektvoll vor dir. Der junge Mann hinter ihm scheint wütend zu sein und versucht vorzutreten, aber der alte Offizier packt seinen Sohn geschickt an dem an seinem Kopf befestigten Kabel. Aus dem Vox-Repeater, der den Mund des jungen Mannes ersetzt, ertönt ein ersticktes Geräusch, das aber von der dröhnenden Stimme seines Vaters übertönt wird:{/n} "Wir werden jede Eurer Entscheidungen akzeptieren, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}The old man frowns, but still bows respectfully to you. The young man behind him looks outraged and tries to step forward, but the older officer deftly seizes his son by the long cable embedded in his head. A stifled splutter erupts from the vox-repeater replacing the young man's mouth, but it is drowned out by the father's booming voice:{/n} "We will accept your decision whatever it may be, Lord Captain."

Der junge Mann hinter ihm scheint wütend zu sein und versucht vorzutreten, aber der alte Offizier packt seinen Sohn geschickt an dem an seinem Kopf befestigten Kabel. Aus dem Vox-Repeater, der den Mund des jungen Mannes ersetzt, ertönt ein ersticktes Geräusch, das aber von der dröhnenden Stimme seines Vaters übertönt wird:{/n} "Wir werden jede Eurer Entscheidungen akzeptieren, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}Le vieil homme se renfrogne, ce qui ne l'empêche pas de s'incliner respectueusement devant vous. Derrière lui, le jeune homme affiche une expression outrée, mais quand il fait mine de s'avancer, son père se saisit adroitement du long câble qui sort de son crâne. Le répéteur-vox du fils émet un crachotement étouffé, aussitôt couvert par la voix tonitruante de son père :{/n} « Nous accepterons votre décision quelle qu'elle soit, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: {n}The old man frowns, but still bows respectfully to you. The young man behind him looks outraged and tries to step forward, but the older officer deftly seizes his son by the long cable embedded in his head. A stifled splutter erupts from the vox-repeater replacing the young man's mouth, but it is drowned out by the father's booming voice:{/n} "We will accept your decision whatever it may be, Lord Captain."

Derrière lui, le jeune homme affiche une expression outrée, mais quand il fait mine de s'avancer, son père se saisit adroitement du long câble qui sort de son crâne. Le répéteur-vox du fils émet un crachotement étouffé, aussitôt couvert par la voix tonitruante de son père :{/n} « Nous accepterons votre décision quelle qu'elle soit, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: {n}El anciano frunce el ceño pero te dedica una reverencia respetuosa. El joven que tiene detrás parece furioso e intenta dar un paso al frente, pero el oficial de mayor edad lo agarra por el cable que tiene conectado a la cabeza. Un farfullo ahogado brota del voco repetidor que sustituye la boca del joven, pero la voz de su padre lo tapa:{/n} «Acataremos su decisión, sea cual sea, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: {n}The old man frowns, but still bows respectfully to you.
